description: Are you still looking for a pair of really warm earmuffs for cold autumn nights? Do you need a pair of ear warmer for your skiing or trekking adventures? Do you want to surprise your loved ones with a thoughtful gift? Our ear muffs can meet all your requirements! Our earmuffs is a must-have warm winter equipment. It is the best gift for sending your girlfriend or friends. It is a good partner for outdoor in winter, which protecting your ear from the cold wind and snow. Warm & Cozy : The fluffy thermal ear muffs are made of soft, warm material that effectively protects the your ears from the cold weather. Everyday Use : They can be used on a daily basis for commuting to work or school and can be worn with long jumpers, scarves, jackets and any other style of clothing. Wide Applicability : The plush thermal ear muffs are suitable for everyday commuting to work and school, but also for a variety of outdoor activities such as skiing, camping and hiking in a variety of scenarios. Best Gift : Warm plush ear muffs are the perfect winter gift, send your care during the upcoming Thanksgiving, Christmas and other holidays! NOTICE : Avoid sun exposure Hand wash only If you have any question please feel free to contact us and we will reply you within 24H and give you a satisfactory solution Tips:Due to the material of the product, it is a normal phenomenon that the fluff slightly coming off in the early stage. Please feel free to wear it.
